title: Effishiency
description: Catch multiple fish with just one cast! How effishient!
body:
Effishiency
---
**Effishiency** adds a new enchantment for fishing rods. This rare enchantment allows players to reel in up to 4 items from just one cast! This means you can catch up to four cod, salmon, saddles, or anything else in one go! 

To balance things out, each item you reel in removes 1 durability from your fishing rod, however this feature is configurable.
